query:
SELECT c.id, c.externalId, c.name, c.siteAddress, c.status, c.serviceCount,
       s.id as svcId, s.externalId as svcExtId, s.serviceType, s.status as svcStatus, s.customerExternalId, s.isTerminated
FROM customers c
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.siteAddress LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR c.siteAddress LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR c.siteAddress LIKE '%KENSINGTON%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%BLACKBEAUTY%' OR c.name LIKE '%BLACK BEAUTY%' OR c.name LIKE '%KENSINGTON%';

LEFT JOIN services s ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
